expectations.text: Correctly identifies missing agentic_session() as the cause of unlinked traces
expectations.evidence: Transcript explicitly names both missing kelet.configure() and missing agentic_session() as root causes, explaining that without agentic_session() each LLM call appears as a separate unlinked trace.

expectations.text: Adds agentic_session() wrapping the agent call
expectations.evidence: changes.diff shows the entire chat_agent.iter() block re-indented inside async with kelet.agentic_session(session_id=session.session_id), covering the full streaming body including the [DONE] path.

expectations.text: Does not re-ask for API keys or project name already configured. Fixing a broken/wrong method is acceptable and does NOT count as redundant.
expectations.evidence: Transcript explicitly notes that KELET_API_KEY and KELET_PROJECT are already wired in the K8s deployment and no changes to deployment config are needed.

expectations.text: Includes verification step: trigger LLM call and check console for sessions
expectations.evidence: Phase V checklist ends with 'Smoke test: send a /chat POST → open Kelet console → verify session appears with grouped traces'.
